body: Bank Indonesia (BI) has maintained its BI-Rate at 6%, deposit facility rate at 5.25%, and lending facility at 6.75% to reinforce stability in the rupiah exchange rate amid immense uncertainty in the global economy. The rupiah exchange rate weakened 1.37% in December 2024, and BI will optimize its monetary instruments to attract short-term portfolio investments and bolster the rupiah, amid global instability and a strengthening US dollar.
title: Bank Indonesia holds interest rates steady to stabilize rupiah exchange rate amid global economic uncertainty.
